posts.author: mstanczak (Marcin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,

Im facing small problem with API and python. I have board where its about 3000 files, but I cant download it by monday.com, its just dont do that. I dont want to download it one by one, I need to automate it a little. From my research, if I have files in “file” tab in pulse, I cant download them. I cant reach them from api. How can I do that ? Maybe soneone achive that and can share solution.

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Take a look at the answers to this question. Try assets_source as gallery or all. It should explain what you need:

How do I find the files attached to an item in graphql? monday Apps & Developers
I have this item, or rather subitem (with a file attached): [Screenshot 2024-10-04 at 21.48.34] The file is not in a column, or a status, so I don’t seem to be able to locate it using graphql: [Screenshot 2024-10-04 at 21.49.00] How can I find it with graphql? Where am I going wrong?
